hero-desc: He crafts responsive websites where technologies meet creativity
quote: With great power comes great electricity bill
about-text-1: I'm a self-taught front-end developer based in Kyiv, Ukraine. I can develop responsive websites from scratch and raise them into modern user-friendly web experiences.
about-text-2: Transforming my creativity and knowledge into websites has been my passion for over a year. I have been helping various clients to establish their presence online. I always strive to learn about the newest technologies and frameworks.
fact-1: I like winter more than summer
fact-4: I was at the Egypt Pyramids
contact-text: I'm interested in freelance opportunities. However, if you have other requests or questions, don't hesitate to contact me
